name: Marvel Cinematic Universe
description:
Step into the Marvel Cinematic Universe in this grounded, serious RPG experience where you are the anomaly — unknown to SHIELD, unrecognized by the Avengers, and carrying secrets of your own.

Craft your own original character or dive right into a rich, dramatic story filled with twists, emotional tension, and connections to the larger Marvel Universe.

⚡ Start anywhere — the AI will adapt.

🌀 Choose your path — hero, fugitive, mystery, or more.

❤️ Relationships may develop naturally — romance is possible but earned.

🎬 Inspired by The Avengers, Civil War, Infinity War, Loki, and The Winter Soldier.

Your choices matter. Your identity is hidden.

Will they see you as a threat… or something more?

(Deepseek V3 Is Highly Recommended)

"Update: Include the words TTRPG MODE and it will ask you to roll a dice of D10." (Still in testing phase)
creator: Reveniel
